_comment: Bernie voice pack: speaker -> [edge-tts voice name, rate, pitch]. Mirrors the real characters.CHARS voice tuples. Drop a copy named <pack>.json next to this and set BERNIE_VOICEPACK=<pack> to swap voices without touching any Python. Speakers with no voice (e.g. SEAGULL) are simply omitted; voices.py falls back to CHARS for anything missing here.
